options.name: -block_master_clone
options.description: If specified, block master/clone partitions for H-tree instances and nets

options.name: -dry_run
options.description: Run the synthesis algorithm but do not insert the H-tree into the DB

options.name: -report_out_file
options.description: Write the final flexible H-tree metrics to the specified file.

options.name: -spec_file
options.description: Do not amend the clock tree spec to reflect the new state of the clock tree but write the amendments to a file with the given name

options.name: -trial_mode
options.description: {true false placement_only routing_only} If specified, enable trial routing and placement mode for flexH (true false placement_only routing_only).

options.name: -use_estimated_routes
options.description: Do not call NanoRoute, so leave the estimates in the netlist
